title: Cazh.id
description:
- User DB: 300,000 Users (Email, Hash, Phone, Address, DOB) for https://bkdp.cazh.id/.

- KYC Vault: 7,800 Government IDs + 4,200 Selfies (including "Hold-to-Face" ID selfies).

- 34 SQL Databases for associated schools (Students/Parents/Staff).

- Corporate/Financial: Full Investor Database + partner documents

- Collateral documents (Vehicle Registration Documents & Property Deeds)

- Billing Proofs

- Full src code of their services

Data stolen: PII, SOURCE CODE, KYC
